title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy Digital Technologies - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy Digital Technologies - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Meerut office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
